<section_header_level_1><loc_46><loc_74><loc_171><loc_81>ELECTRICAL CHARACTERISTICS</section_header_level_1>
<otsl><loc_46><loc_88><loc_313><loc_210><fcel>CHARACTERISTICS<fcel>RC0805 1/8 W<nl><fcel>Operating Temperature Range<fcel>-55 °C to +155 °C<nl><fcel>Maximum Working Voltage<fcel>150 V<nl><fcel>Maximum Overload Voltage<fcel>300 V<nl><fcel>Dielectric Withstanding Voltage<fcel>300 V<nl><fcel>Resistance Range<fcel>5% (E24) 1 Ω to 22 MΩ<nl><ecel><fcel>1% (E96) 1 Ω to 10 MΩ<nl><fcel>Temperature Coefficient<fcel>Zero Ohm Jumper < 0.05 Ω<nl><fcel>Jumper Criteria<fcel>R ≤ 10 Ω;  R > 10 Ω ±200 ppm/°C<nl><fcel>Rated Current<fcel>2.0 A<nl><fcel>Maximum Current<fcel>5.0 A<nl><caption><loc_56><loc_86><loc_79><loc_92>Table 2</caption></otsl>
